nasb.text: You will sow but you will not reap. You will tread the olive but will not anoint yourself with oil; And the grapes, but you will not drink wine.

esv.text: You shall sow, but not reap; you shall tread olives, but not anoint yourselves with oil; you shall tread grapes, but not drink wine.

cnv.text: 你要撒種，卻不得收割， 你要榨橄欖油，卻不得油抹身； 你要榨葡萄汁，卻不得酒喝。

ccb.text: 你撒种，却不得收割； 你榨橄榄，却无油抹身； 你踩葡萄，却无酒可喝。
